title: Endless Conveyor
description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]"ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!"[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]40[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each

options.title: Observe the Chef
options.description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [Ends the event]

options.title: Grab Caviar off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain [green]4[/green] Max HP. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Clam Roll off the Belt
options.requires: Only appears if not at full HP

options.title: Grab Fried Eel off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a random Colorless Card to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Golden Fysh off the Belt
options.requires: Only appears after first grab (weight: 1, very rare)

options.title: Grab Jelly Liver off the Belt
Grab Seapunk Salad off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Spicy Snappy off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Suspicious Condiment off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. Continue feasting!
options.requires: Only appears if has open potion slots

options.title: Broke
options.description: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].
options.requires: Appears when you cannot afford to grab another dish

conditions: All players must have at least 120 Gold
notes:
This is a looping event where you repeatedly choose dishes from a conveyor belt. After each grab, a new dish is rolled and displayed for your next choice. The event continues until you run out of Gold or choose to Leave.

[gold]Event Flow:[/gold]
1. [blue]Initial choice[/blue]: Pick a random dish or Observe the Chef (ends event immediately)
2. [blue]After each grab[/blue]: A new dish is rolled, and you can grab it or Leave
3. [blue]When broke[/blue]: The grab option becomes locked and shows "Broke" — you must Leave

[gold]Dish Costs and Rewards:[/gold]
All dishes cost [red]40 Gold[/red] to grab except Golden Fysh (free):
- [blue]Caviar[/blue]: Gain 4 Max HP
- [blue]Clam Roll[/blue]: Heal 10 HP
- [blue]Fried Eel[/blue]: Add random Colorless card
- [blue]Golden Fysh[/blue]: Gain 75 Gold (no cost, very rare)
- [blue]Jelly Liver[/blue]: Transform a card
- [blue]Seapunk Salad[/blue]: Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] card
- [blue]Spicy Snappy[/blue]: Upgrade a random card
- [blue]Suspicious Condiment[/blue]: Get a random potion

[gold]Dish Selection Mechanics:[/gold]
Each new dish is selected as follows:
- [blue]Every 5th grab[/blue] → always Seapunk Salad
- [blue]Otherwise[/blue] → weighted random from available dishes (excluding the one you just grabbed)
- Caviar and Clam Roll have weight 6 (most common)
- Spicy Snappy, Jelly Liver, Fried Eel, Suspicious Condiment have weight 3
- Golden Fysh has weight 1 (rarest)
- Clam Roll is excluded if already at full HP
- Suspicious Condiment is excluded if no potion slots available
- Golden Fysh only appears after the first grab

[gold]Key Notes:[/gold]
- Golden Fysh is the only way to gain Gold in this event — crucial for multiple grabs
- Seapunk Salad cannot be chosen randomly; it's guaranteed every 5 grabs
- The same dish never rolls twice in a row
- Observe the Chef is only available on the initial choice and immediately ends the event
